mission.title: istio: Istio Operator Error Loops
mission.description: Istio Operator Error Loops . This issue affects 18+ users.

steps.title: Identify istio troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your istio deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n istio-system --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review istio configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant istio configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio
```
### Bug Description

We're upgrading our Istio cluster from v1.12.7 to v1.14.1 using Istio Operator. Istio cluster itself is fine, ingressgateway and Istio proxy are updated, but Istio Operator keep looping error and usage memory keep increased.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Istio Operator Error Loops
steps.description:
>  Yes our EKS clusters have had istio on for 2 years, so had several different operator configs. However, i can also repro the error on a clean KIND cluster, using the default operator profile.

the root cause of that is multi call of the following function, but I do not have any good idea about how to fix it now.
https://github.com/istio/istio/blob/1aca7a67afd7b3e1d24fafb2fbfbeaf1e41534c0/operator/pkg/helmreconciler/reconciler.go#L154

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm Istio Operator Error Loops  is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n istio-system --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
>  Yes our EKS clusters have had istio on for 2 years, so had several different operator configs. However, i can also repro the error on a clean KIND cluster, using the default operator profile.

the root cause of that is multi call of the following function, but I do not have any good idea about how to fix it now.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with istio installed or the issue environment reproducible.
